channel.title: Rank Builder SEO
channel.description: Source-heavy SEO research, buyer-defense guides, provider reviews, audit reviews, and experiment logs.

item.title: Cloudflare Pages SEO Baseline
item.description: A practical baseline for checking a static Cloudflare Pages deployment before deeper SEO experiments begin.

item.title: SEO Pricing for Small Businesses
item.description: A buyer-defense pricing guide focused on scope, tradeoffs, and the questions that matter more than decorative averages.

item.title: Technical SEO Baseline Checklist
item.description: A restrained checklist for confirming that a site can be crawled, understood, and measured before deeper SEO work begins.

item.title: How to Read an SEO Audit
item.description: A practical guide to reading SEO audits for proof, prioritization, and buyer usefulness instead of document theatrics.

item.title: How to Evaluate an SEO Provider
item.description: A buyer-defense guide to evaluating SEO providers without relying on prestige signals or decorative certainty.

item.title: RB-EXP-001: Title Format Baseline
item.description: The first public Rank Builder experiment log for title format testing on a clean static publishing shell.

item.title: Sitemap
item.description: A short definition of XML sitemaps and what they do for public, indexable URLs.

item.title: robots.txt
item.description: A short definition of robots.txt and how it helps communicate crawl rules to automated agents.

item.title: Canonical URL
item.description: A plain-language definition of canonical URLs and why they matter for duplicate and preferred page paths.

item.title: Ranking Guarantees
item.description: Why ranking guarantees are a high-risk pattern for buyers unless the terms are narrow, concrete, and reviewable.
